{{Quote|We've got company. Two frigates, a cruiser, and-yes, a Star Destroyer, Imperial-class. Could be the ''Adjudicator''.|[[Nitram]], to [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Juno Eclipse/Legends|Juno Eclipse]]|<ref name="TFUII" />}}
The '''''Liberator''''', known as the '''''Adjudicator ''''' during its [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] service, was an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] originally used by the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] and later by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==History==
===Imperial service===
{{Quote|The first time I heard of Vimran Trell, I thought to myself: What could a cook possibly do for us? When the Adjudicator was sent to destroy a Rebel base, Trell proved his worth by warning Alliance agents. The Adjudicator found only a few deserted buildings.|[[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]]|<ref name="CRO" />}}
Early in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Vimran Trell]] served as backup-chef on the ''Adjudicator'', and so impressed [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Renquet]] with his cooking, that Renquet requested the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] become the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of his [[Sector fleet/Legends|Sector Fleet]]. Vimran Trell was in fact a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]] who managed to prevent most attacks of the ''Adjudicator'' for years. During that time, the ship was under command of Captain [[Krin]].<ref name="CRO" />

In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], the ''Adjudicator'' was under command of [[Baron/Legends|Baron]] [[Merillion Tarko]] and was part of the [[Cato Neimoidia/Legends|Cato Neimoidia]] [[Navy/Legends|Defense Fleet]]. Roughly a year after [[Galen Marek]]'s death, the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]], led by the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B escort frigate]] [[Salvation (flagship)|''Salvation'']], [[Raid on Cato Neimoidia|attacked the planet]]. The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] underestimated the Imperial naval strength and the ''Adjudicator'' eventually put them to flight.<ref name="TFUII" /> The same year, the ''Adjudicator'' fought in the [[Uprising on Gerrard V|Battle of Gerrard V]] alongside the [[Relentless (Dorja)|''Relentless'']].<ref name="GWNN" />

[[File:Accuser-Adjudicator-Stalker_TESB.jpg|thumb|left|250px|''Accuser'' (left), ''Adjudicator'' (center), and ''Stalker'' (right) shortly before the Battle of Hoth]]
In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], it was used to destroy the wreckage of the downed Star Destroyer ''[[Anya Karu]]''. Two of its [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]] were destroyed by [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett's]] [[Slave I/Legends|''Slave I'']] during the operation.<ref name="E28" />

Eight months after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], ''Adjudicator'' [[Battle of the Poln system|fought]] [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Nuso Esva]]'s forces in the [[Poln system/Legends|Poln system]] as part of [[Death Squadron/Legends|Death Squadron]].<ref name="CoO" /> The ship continued with that squadron, serving in the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] and eventually the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], which would be its last battle as part of the Empire.<ref name="BtM" />

===New Republic service===
{{Quote|Luke's Star Destroyer went down... in the Imperial City itself. Generals Calrissian and Antilles were aboard... among others.|[[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]], to [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]]|<ref name="DE2" />}}
[[File:Avenger-ROTJ.png|thumb|left|200px|The ''Adjudicator'' (right) arrives at [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] with the [[Avenger/Legends|''Avenger'']] (foreground) and ''[[Stalker/Legends|Stalker]]''.]]
The ''Adjudicator'' was captured by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], along with the [[Emancipator|''Accuser'']]. ''Adjudicator's'' [[Engine/Legends|engines]] and power systems were almost totally destroyed, and several Alliance heavy [[Cruiser/Legends|cruisers]] were relegated to towing the captured Imperial vessel.<ref name="TTABS">''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]''</ref> Kept secret, [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] later decided to refit the ships for use in stealth runs against Imperial [[Warlord/Legends|warlords]]. They were sent to the [[Hast Shipyards]], where they were refitted with improved weapons, sensors, [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrives]], and improved gunnery systems. Following the disastrous [[Battle of the Hast Shipyards]], however, the refurbishment of the ships took a backseat.<ref name="DESB" />

[[File:Famous_Star_Destroyers_RotJ.png|thumb|right|250px|The ''Adjudicator'' (second from left) at the Battle of Endor.]]
When the ''Liberator'' was finally put back into service, it boasted a number of improvements, including six [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] launchers, improved sensors, a faster Class 1.5 [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], and reduced crew and gunnery requirements.<ref name="DESB" />

In [[6 ABY/Legends|6.5 ABY]], now renamed the ''Liberator'', the vessel was used with the ''[[Emancipator]]'' as a feint at [[Ord Mirit]] in order to lure the [[Eviscerator/Legends|''Eviscerator'']] far from the [[Second Battle of Borleias]].<ref name="RS">''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]''</ref> The ship later participated at the [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|Liberation of Coruscant]] where it fought on the frontline with the [[Home One/Legends|''Home One'']] and the ''Emancipator''.<ref name="WG" />

The ''Emancipator'' and ''Liberator'' suffered severe damage during the [[Post–Zsinj campaigns|Post-Zsinj campaign]] and were recalled to undergo extensive repairs at the Hast shipyards.<ref name="TEC" />

In [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], the ''Liberator'' was returning to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], when the planet was [[Second Battle of Coruscant|attacked]] by the Empire. The ship emerged from [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] in front of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial fleet]] and was severely damaged.<ref name="DAOOC">{{WEGCite|story=Down And Out On Coruscant|book=Dark Empire Sourcebook}}</ref> The ship crashed into [[Galactic City/Legends|Imperial City]] as result of damage sustained during the battle. In a similar manner to a stunt [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|his father]] pulled [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|29 years earlier]], Luke skillfully used the shields and repulsorlifts of the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] to prevent the death of the crew.<ref name="DE1" /> The ship was commanded by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[General/Legends|Generals]] [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]. After the crash, the survivors were transported to [[Pinnacle Base]] on [[Da Soocha V]] by the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']].<ref name="DE2" />

==Behind the scenes==
According to ''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Second Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'', the ship captured by the Rebels and renamed ''Liberator ''was the ''Adjucator''. All other sources, including ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', have confirmed that the correct name of the ship is ''Adjudicator''.
